headline: Bio-Techne to Present at the Bank of America Securities 2026 Global Healthcare Conference
summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that Kim Kelderman, President and Chief Executive Officer, will present at the Bank of America Securities 2026 Global Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 9:20 a.m. PDT. A live webcast of the presentation can be accessed via the IR Calendar page of Bio-Techne's Investor Relations website at https://investors.bio-techne.com/ir-calendar.
